addons.name: AMOLED Theme for Firefox
addons.description: A theme for Firefox that makes the browser look like a full black canvas. It’s simple, sleek and stylish, perfect for those who want to focus on their content without distractions.
addons.fullDescription:
Want a clean, clear and professional browsing experience?
The AMOLED theme for Firefox is the perfect choice. This minimalistic theme makes your browser look like a full black canvas and helps you focus on the content you want to see – not on flashy colors or details. Perfect for those who prefer a minimalist design or need to focus on their content without distractions, this powerful Firefox theme is just what you’ve been looking for!
